title: Top 20 Most Popular ELIXIR Fragrances Ranked From S-Tier To TRASH

video_class.receipt: hzqxkp3OqQw@15760-23160 '20 of the absolute most popular men's elixir fragrances today and rank them out from worst to best'

receipts: hzqxkp3OqQw@94840-99800 '[K] did not compete with Y, Bleu de Chanel, and Sauvage as far as sales goes'
@1070280-1078480 'Sauvage Elixir did the whole thing where it smells nothing like the Sauvage fragrances that came before it... the eau de toilette, the eau de parfum, or the parfum'
resolved.note: Sauvage Elixir (#1, distinct flanker) + market-causality claim: 'Sauvage Elixir... set off all of this... every other brand went what if we do elixir and charge more' @1006480-1038040

resolved.receipt: @94840 (bare 'Y', medium) + Y Elixir segment 'a lot of overlap with a bunch of the other Y fragrances' @501760
@792560-798520 'Invictus Victory Elixir mixed with Invictus Parfum if you want to very simply dumb it down'

dupe_economy_receipt.note: CREATOR RECOMMENDS DUPE OVER ORIGINAL on price: Y Elixir '$200 for a 2-oz... paying 100 bucks per ounce... for a lot of people this one might make more sense to get a dupe or inspired by fragrance of, because those are really well done, and they cost much less' @463720-538480

market_reads.note: K-line failure read: 'not selling. Nobody really cares about it... the K line probably needs to go away' @125479-145160
white-space idea: 'An elixir fragrance specifically made for summer... maybe that's the big brain thing somebody needs to do next' @921040-937920

ranking_top5: 4 Guilty Elixir (~'Pegasus mixed with Reflection Man')

receipts: short_description: per-elixir affiliate links (7+ visible, truncated)
